message:
🐛 fix: prevent duplicate mission completion events (#2893)

Both stream_complete and result handlers in useMissions emit
emitMissionCompleted unconditionally. If both fire for the same
mission, GA4 double-counts completions. Added status === 'running'
guard so the event only fires once per mission run.

Fixes #2861

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
